chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1498 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 06-06-2024 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhatti, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ***** The Petitioners were appointed vide order dated 12.11.2016 as police constables in Police Department Tando Muhammad Khan and through the instant Petition they seek direction to issue difference arrears/salary for the period of 07 months and 17 days. On being served, Respondent No.2/ IGP Sindh has submitted his parawise comments, paragraph No.6 thereof being relevant is reproduced as under:- “For remaining period 07 months relevant documents i.e attested copies of pay slips, Non drawl Certificate, Service Books, appointment orders, Original Difference/ arrears pay bill were furnished by SSP Tando Muhammad Khan vide letter No.A/6181, dated: 26.09.2017 and No.6182, dated: 28.09.2017 for grant of their remaining salaries were sent to IGP/Sindh, Karachi by his office vide No.A/5388, dated: 20.02.2018. Same were moved to Home Department, Government of Sindh by IGP Sindh Karachi vide No. AO/252/5624, dated: 04.05.2018 from where, the same were sent to Finance Department Government of Sindh by Home Department vide letter No.POL-II-HD/2270/2018, dated: 01.08.2019. That finance Department, Government of Sindh asked further following documents;- a. Certificate regarding that these appointments are genuine in accordance with sanctioned strength and are not under the investigation at National Bureau (NAB). b.

That finance Department, Government of Sindh asked further following documents;- a. Certificate regarding that these appointments are genuine in accordance with sanctioned strength and are not under the investigation at National Bureau (NAB). b. Prescribed Proforma of Finance in respect each per personnel. c. Attested copy of service Book duly verified by DAO concerned. d. Pay bills in respect of each. 2 e. Attested copy of Note for Chief Secretary Sindh. The DIGP/Hyderabad further submitted that the above said documents received from SSP/Tando Muhammad Khan vide letter No.1336, dated: 28.07.2021, same were sent to IGP/Sindh Karachi Finance Branch CPO Sindh Karachi.” In view of the above, we hereby dispose of this Petition with direction to IGP Sindh to expedite the matter and ensure payment of arrears of salary of Petitioners within sixty days hereof, if they are entitled thereof. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
